codeReview.summary: The commit adds 20 lines of reciprocal navigation links across 9 documentation files (5 flow packets and 4 module packets). Each link was verified: all target files exist, all navigation chains are complete and bidirectional, and no contradictory paths were introduced.

summary: PASS. The commit successfully completes the end-to-end navigation walkthrough for VAL-FLOW-006 and VAL-CROSS-006. Nine documentation files were updated with 20 lines of reciprocal links connecting modules → flows → ADRs → frontend handoff packets → deprecated registry. All link targets exist on disk. Two full navigation chains were verified: (1) INDEX → sales → order-to-cash → ADR-006 → frontend-handoff-commercial → deprecated/INDEX, and (2) INDEX → hr → hr-payroll → frontend-handoff-finance → deprecated/INDEX. Both chains have complete bidirectional (reciprocal) links. No contradictory paths, no broken links, no blocking issues found.
